title: Girls’ Night Wednesday
description: Celebrate midweek in style! Enjoy a special night dedicated to ladies every Wednesday with great vibes, fun moments, and unforgettable memories.

title: Ladies Day Sunday
description: Sundays are for queens! Join us for exclusive offers, great ambiance, and the perfect Sunday vibes made just for ladies.

title: Free Sheesha Deal
description: Spend 100 AED or more and enjoy a free sheesha on us. Relax, unwind, and elevate your evening with smooth flavors.
